Free technology grants and discounts available for nonprofits. Get started

Transform nonprofit operations

Eligible nonprofits get Dynamics 365 Business Central starting at $32.00 (USD) per user per month – 60% off commercial pricing.
Get started Free assessment

Dynamics 365 Business Central

Transform nonprofit operations with Dynamics 365 Business Central, a comprehensive business management solution that connects finance, operations, fundraising, supply chain, and programs.
Free trial

Improve visibility into funding and program budgets

See how Dynamics 365 Business Central can help your nonprofit:
1. Gain better visibility into contributions.
2. Manage budgets effectively.
3. Process contributions quickly.
See guided tour

Get an initial cost estimate and set of recommendations unique to your organization.

Try Dynamics 365 Business Central free for 30 days.

Learn how moving to the cloud with Dynamics 365 Business Central can transform nonprofit operations and accelerate mission impact.

Connect with a Dynamics 365 nonprofit partner

Our partners make it their mission to help accelerate your mission. These select Dynamics 365 Business Central partners are ready to deliver solutions to improve financial performance, streamline operations, optimize supply chain, and facilitate program success.

Customer stories

World Vision Germany

World Vision Germany uses Dynamics 365 to advance fundraising for children.

Read story

Blue Marine Foundation

Blue Marine Foundation’s mission to save oceans outgrew its reporting system. Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central provided automatic reporting, enabling swift action for its environmental causes.

Read story

Call2Recycle

Call2Recycle, the largest battery recycling program in the US and Canada, uses Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Power Platform to save $25K annually and manage e-bike and EV battery recycling programs.

Read story

WWF Italia

WWF Italia supports global conservation. Switching to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central online improved funding tracking, saving staff time and enhancing reporting for key stakeholders.

Read story
